_note: Stack policy from a measured with/without ladder: rung E1 excludes the frames flagged by pooled defect-side robust z >= 3.5 over the full set's registration regdata (a dwelling cloud band, plus one defocus/settling frame). The no-exclusion control measured better on sky noise (the sqrt-N prediction) but carried coherent cloud residue rejection could not remove -- the band dwelt over one region long enough to be the per-pixel majority, leaving the gate rings at the bound; E1 restores the margin and is the smallest defect-free exclusion. Render knobs track GENERIC (no approved look yet). Stack build: partitioned self-flat route, pinned reference, coverage crop.
